title: The Straw Hats Meet Elbaf’s Danger
description: On pages 13–15, this part follows Unknown person #13, Usopp, Zoro, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Loki as Elbaf’s present-day danger converges on the Straw Hats, Loki, and the giants as the island’s history and World Government pressure collide.
scene: Elbaf’s present-day danger converges on the Straw Hats, Loki, and the giants as the island’s history and World Government pressure collide.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They didn't use their own strength at all in this invasion! They relied on those monsters...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and hijacked the minds of all those proud warriors, trying to force them to slaughter each other!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How dare you carry out such a cowardly and underhanded scheme!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: ...Fight with their own swords and shields!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They put their own lives on the line... they're a nation of warriors!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you want to conquer them... do it fair and square!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Fight them head on, you spineless coward!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She's the source of the Haki we felt...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: ...down in the realm of the dead!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wasn't planning on letting these guys off the hook anyway.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: This battle shall divide the world.

summary: This part advances Elbaf’s Crisis Reaches the Straw Hats through 29 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
